allowed_claims: A local completion grammar survives multiple finite audits.
There is a non-label monotone order signal once the four groups are known.
There is a bounded inside/outside reading of paired deltas.
There is a real twelve-microcell transition layer.
The current manuscript includes a boundary section preserving the open problems.

closed_or_locked.name: non_label_monotone_order_signal
closed_or_locked.summary: slot_delta_mod15 and fiber_delta_mod60 are non-label fields with opposite monotones recovering level order after grouping.

closed_or_locked.name: inside_outside_boundary_reading
closed_or_locked.summary: outside span and inside residual produce a bounded local completion reading.

closed_or_locked.name: transition_microcell_layer
closed_or_locked.summary: twelve form-pure two-row C_delta microcells exist, three per level.

closed_or_locked.name: manuscript_boundary
closed_or_locked.summary: the local completion boundary section is written and wired into paper/main.tex.

closed_or_locked.name: overleaf_bundle
closed_or_locked.summary: the Overleaf zip has been rebuilt with the boundary section included.

grammar.core_statement: The current evidence supports a local completion grammar, not a cosmic conclusion. The grammar is finite, local, and dependency-bound. It is not native closure, not full role-labeled shared_B universe derivation, and not Gap A closure. answer-label leakage remains open.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim Gap A closure.
Do not claim native proof of the completion ladder.
Do not claim the answer-label leakage risk is resolved.
Do not claim derivation of the full role-labeled shared_B universe.
Do not claim cosmology, ontology, or a universe-scale navel metaphor.

grid_hint_axis.boundary: No tested native row field supplied the sheet or channel coordinate.
grid_hint_axis.claim: The visible count-level structure is compatible with two sheets, three channels, and four levels.

inside_outside_axis.boundary: This is a bounded reading of paired finite deltas, not a physical or cosmic claim.
inside_outside_axis.claim: outside boundary span rises while inside fiber residual falls.

order_axis.boundary: The fields do not themselves derive the four-form partition.
order_axis.claim: Opposite monotones recover the Euclidean order once the four groups are known.

transition_microcell_axis.boundary: The twelve microcells did not aggregate into the four Euclidean forms in the tested quotient family.
transition_microcell_axis.claim: C_delta_mod15 exposes twelve form-pure two-row transition microcells.

grammar.name: local_completion_grammar

negative_results.name: delta_fields_do_not_partition_forms
negative_results.summary: native delta fields alone do not reconstruct the four six-row groups.

negative_results.name: flat_row_field_cut_not_found
negative_results.summary: tested flat non-label row-field cuts did not derive the four-form partition.

negative_results.name: simple_incidence_cut_not_found
negative_results.summary: tested shared-endpoint and reciprocal incidence relations did not derive the four-form partition.

negative_results.name: six_component_refinement_not_found
negative_results.summary: six C-endpoint incidence components did not refine into four forms in the tested family.

negative_results.name: microcell_aggregation_not_found
negative_results.summary: tested microcell quotient aggregations did not recover the four Euclidean forms.

negative_results.name: two_by_three_by_four_grid_not_confirmed
negative_results.summary: the 2 x 3 x 4 count-level hint was not confirmed by native sheet/channel fields.

next_phase_recommendation.reason: Repeated row-field, incidence, refinement, aggregation, and grid-coordinate tests failed. The missing grouping law is more likely upstream in construction provenance than in flat row features.

open_frontiers.name: native_four_form_partition
open_frontiers.question: What source-construction law groups the 24 edge records into four six-row forms?

open_frontiers.name: answer_label_leakage
open_frontiers.question: Can the four-form grouping be derived without form_index, row order, target labels, or downstream answer labels?

open_frontiers.name: source_construction_law
open_frontiers.question: Does the grouping law live upstream in construction provenance rather than row-level fields?

open_frontiers.name: full_role_labeled_shared_B_universe
open_frontiers.question: Can the local cell be connected back to the full reciprocal WXYZTI answer-pair universe?

open_frontiers.name: Gap_A_closure
open_frontiers.question: Can the complete Gap A closure chain be proven after the local provenance bridge is solved?

statement: Artifact 070 is a grammar handoff JSON with a dependency ledger. It encapsulates the current local completion grammar, not a cosmic conclusion. It is not native closure, not full role-labeled shared_B universe derivation, and not Gap A closure. answer-label leakage remains open.
